title: Fortive (FTV) Up 4.2% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Fortive (FTV) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Fortive Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend on its Common Stock
text: EVERETT, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fortive Corporation (“Fortive”) (NYSE: FTV) announced today that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share of its common stock, representing 14% increase over the previous quarterly dividend. James A. Lico, President and Chief Executive Officer, stated, “As a reflection of the confidence in our capital strength and robust cash generation, we are increasing our quarterly dividend in the fourth quarter, while prioritizing.
